name: Engineer Wise Petrol Expense Report
query:
Select z.Employee as "Employee:Data:150"
,z.Day1 as "Day 1:Data:100"
,z.Day2 as "Day 2:Data:100"
,z.Day3 as "Day 3:Data:100"
,z.Day4 as "Day 4:Data:100"
,z.Day5 as "Day 5:Data:100"
,z.Day6 as "Day 6:Data:100"
,z.Day7 as "Day 7:Data:100"
,z.Day8 as "Day 8:Data:100"
,z.Day9 as "Day 9:Data:100"
,z.Day10 as "Day 10:Data:100"
,z.Day11 as "Day 11:Data:100"
,z.Day12 as "Day 12:Data:100"
,z.Day13 as "Day 13:Data:100"
,z.Day14 as "Day 14:Data:100"
,z.Day15 as "Day 15:Data:100"
,z.Day16 as "Day 16:Data:100"
,z.Day17 as "Day 17:Data:100"
,z.Day18 as "Day 18:Data:100"
,z.Day19 as "Day 19:Data:100"
,z.Day20 as "Day 20:Data:100"
,z.Day21 as "Day 21:Data:100"
,z.Day22 as "Day 22:Data:100"
,z.Day23 as "Day 23:Data:100"
,z.Day24 as "Day 24:Data:100"
,z.Day25 as "Day 25:Data:100"
,z.Day26 as "Day 26:Data:100"
,z.Day27 as "Day 27:Data:100"
,z.Day28 as "Day 28:Data:100"
,z.Day29 as "Day 29:Data:100"
,z.Day30 as "Day 30:Data:100"
,z.Day31 as "Day 31:Data:100"
,z.Total as "Total:currency:100"
from
(
select "Bill Nos." as Employee
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=1 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day1"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=2 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day2"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=3 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day3"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=4 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day4"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=5 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day5"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=6 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day6"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=7 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day7"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=8 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day8"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=9 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day9"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=10 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day10"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=11 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day11"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=12 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day12"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=13 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day13"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=14 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day14"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=15 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day15"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=16 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day16"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=17 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day17"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=18 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day18"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=19 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day19"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=20 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day20"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=21 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day21"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=22 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day22"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=23 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day23"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=24 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day24"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=25 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day25"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=26 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day26"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=27 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day27"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=28 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day28"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=29 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day29"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=30 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day30"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=31 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day31"
,(select count(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Total"
from `tabExpense Claim` as EC
inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PE on EC.name=PE.parent
where  (monthname(EC.posting_date)= %(month)s|| monthname("2022-10-06")) and year(EC.posting_date)= %(year)s and EC.employee=%(employee)s 
group by EC.employee

Union ALL

select "Bill Amount." as Employee
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=1 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day1"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=2 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day2"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=3 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day3"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=4 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day4"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=5 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day5"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=6 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day6"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=7 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day7"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=8 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day8"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=9 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day9"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=10 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day10"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=11 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day11"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=12 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day12"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=13 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day13"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=14 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day14"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=15 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day15"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=16 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day16"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=17 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day17"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=18 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day18"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=19 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day19"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=20 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day20"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=21 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day21"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=22 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day22"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=23 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day23"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=24 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day24"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=25 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day25"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=26 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day26"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=27 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day27"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=28 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day28"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=29 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day29"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=30 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day30"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=31 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day31"
,(select ROUND(SUM(PED.amount),0) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Total"

from `tabExpense Claim` as EC
inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PE on EC.name=PE.parent
where  (monthname(EC.posting_date)= %(month)s|| monthname("2022-10-06")) and year(EC.posting_date)= %(year)s and EC.employee=%(employee)s 
group by EC.employee

)z
